title: Datasets
description: Upload, annotate, and manage your training data.

table.caption: Sample Table
table.emptyBody: Upload files first, then quickly add tags or open the original file via signed link.

detail.title: Dataset Detail
detail.description: Browse samples, upload files, and manage versions.
detail.browseDescription: Supports table and gallery views; all previews and downloads use signed URLs.
detail.noVersions: No versions yet. Please commit first.

upload.title: Drag and drop sample files, or select from your computer
upload.description: Uses the existing direct-to-storage upload flow; only the UI feedback is redesigned here.
upload.defaultMessage: A Data Item will be created automatically and processing will start after upload.
upload.complete: Upload complete and processing task submitted
